title: Dreaming
description: Each night the agent reflects on your recent sessions, distills strategy candidates, web-grounds them, and surfaces the top items for your review. Strategies live as Anthropic-format SKILL.md cards under .claude/skills/strategies/, indexed by their description.

runReason.dreaming-disabled: Dreaming is disabled — enable it first.
runReason.over-budget: Today's project spend already exceeds the configured budget.

feedbackSaved: Feedback recorded for the next run.
noActivity: No activity yet. Click “Run now” or wait for the cron trigger.
runNowHelper: Triggers a HARVEST run immediately. Subject to the soft budget pre-flight check.
